commit.subject: LU-9495 tests: debug recovery-double-scale fail_on_skip
commit.message:
LU-9495 tests: debug recovery-double-scale fail_on_skip

It looks like recovery-double-scale is exiting when
skip_env() is called.  Let's see if we are exiting or if
there is a different issue.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
